SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription ,cdiAlertQueryResponseID ,createdDateTime ,updatedDateTime ,hashKey FROM( SELECT CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc AS cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription ,CDIAlertQueryResponseID AS cdiAlertQueryResponseID ,UpdatedDateTime AS updatedDateTime ,CreatedDateTime AS createdDateTime ,hash(concat(IfNull(CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc,"") ,"|",IfNull(CDIAlertQueryResponseID,""))) AS hashKey FROM CDIAlertQueryResponse)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.cdiAlertQueryResponseID,"")=IfNull(t.cdiAlertQueryResponseID,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey THEN  UPDATE SET  cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription = s.cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription ,cdiAlertQueryResponseID = s.cdiAlertQueryResponseID , updatedDateTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,hashKey = s.hashKey WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  INSERT(cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription ,cdiAlertQueryResponseID ,createdDateTime ,updatedDateTime , hashKey) VALUES ( s.cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription ,s.cdiAlertQueryResponseID, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, s.hashKey)
